headline: 《痴迷》霸榜，《福尔摩斯小姐3》热度不减
headlineEn: Obsession Tops Charts, Enola Holmes 3 Stays Hot
summary: 今日娱乐新闻：《痴迷》持续领跑，《无职转生》与《福尔摩斯小姐3》紧随其后。《末日地堡》《金特务》上榜。本周新片仅1部，市场期待《安昂传奇》等大作。
summaryEn: Today's entertainment: 'Obsession' leads, 'Mushoku Tensei' and 'Enola Holmes 3' follow. 'Silo' and 'Gold Agent' trend. Only 1 new movie this week; market awaits 'Avatar: The Last Airbender'.

topTrends.title: 无职转生：到了异世界就拿出真本事

industryHighlights.text: 今日无新片上映，本周仅1部新片
industryHighlights.en: No new releases today, only 1 new movie this week

industryHighlights.text: 《超级少女》本周热度上升，位列周榜第四
《穿普拉达的女王2》与《玩具总动员5》持续受关注
industryHighlights.en: 'The Devil Wears Prada 2' and 'Toy Story 5' remain popular

industryHighlights.text: 《安昂传奇》等大片即将上映，市场期待值高
industryHighlights.en: Upcoming blockbusters like 'Avatar' generate high anticipation
